S.FORM: John Brisker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 6, John Brisker, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oƒßn Œ≤ris~…ïker s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, *oƒßn Œ≤ris~…ïker, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
